nodes.label: AI as patient guide and teacher
nodes.grounding_span: like having the guide or teacher in my life now that I always needed

nodes.label: AI as corrective co-pilot
nodes.grounding_span: I'd describe it as a corrective co-pilot

nodes.label: AI enabling confidence in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: the 'most' change is probably my confidence with the work I do

nodes.label: AI integration leading to job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: job losses, I wouldn't be particuarly effected as its not a job for me

nodes.label: Personalised adaptive AI
nodes.grounding_span: more personalised AI, that gets to know the users better and is more adaptive to their needs

nodes.label: Personal understanding and self-discovery
nodes.grounding_span: helping me understand myself and the world around me more fully

nodes.label: Helping others with similar challenges
nodes.grounding_span: creating things to help others like me, get on in the world better

nodes.label: Creative productivity and output quality
nodes.grounding_span: turning a mess of ideas into something useable

nodes.label: Societal responsibility and economic fairness
nodes.grounding_span: something has to be done about supporting people who are losing their jobs to AI

nodes.label: Gratitude for AI as a guide
Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: millions of jobs would no longer be needed

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI personalisation
nodes.grounding_span: I think we'll see more personalised AI

nodes.label: Iterative probing and detailed questioning
nodes.grounding_span: probe and query so many things

nodes.label: Reflective integration of AI feedback into self-narrative
nodes.grounding_span: I see those mistakes, that low quality work, as just early stepping stones
